---
title: 'Counterfactual: Merger Example'
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F)
```




- Pick a single market where the number of establishments is not large.
- Equilibrium outcomes before merger

```{r, out.width = "90%"}
htmltools::includeHTML(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/merger/test/linear/equilibrium_pre.html"))
```

### Merger simulation

- Consider a merger between firm A \& B


```{r, out.width = "90%"}
htmltools::includeHTML(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/merger/test/linear/equilibrium_post.html"))
```



##### Prices and shares
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/merger/test/linear/price_share_impact.png"))
```

#### Matches and net prices
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/merger/test/linear/match_netprice_impact.png"))

```


#### Profit

```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/merger/test/linear/profit_impact.png"))

```
